footer.tagline: Your destination for premium electronics and cutting-edge gadgets. Quality tech, delivered fast.

hero.title: Tech That Moves
hero.subtitle: Discover the latest smartphones, laptops, wearables, and accessories. Curated for performance, priced for everyone.

featured.title: Handpicked for You
featured.subtitle: Our editors select the best new tech every week. These are this week's top picks.

categories.title: Find What You Need
categories.subtitle: From flagship phones to smart home devices, we carry every category of modern tech.
categories.phonesDesc: Flagship & mid-range smartphones from Apple, Samsung, Google, and more.
categories.laptopsDesc: Ultrabooks, gaming rigs, and workstations for every workflow.
categories.wearablesDesc: Smartwatches, fitness trackers, and AR glasses for the connected life.
categories.audioDesc: Noise-cancelling headphones, earbuds, and premium speakers.
categories.gamingDesc: Consoles, controllers, gaming mice, and high-refresh monitors.
categories.accessoriesDesc: Cables, cases, chargers, and every essential you need.

deals.title: Save Big on Top Tech
deals.subtitle: Limited-time offers refreshed every Monday. Don't miss out.

trust.title: Built Around Your Trust
trust.freeShippingDesc: Free delivery on all orders over $49. Express options available at checkout.
trust.returnsDesc: Not happy? Return any item within 30 days, no questions asked.
trust.warrantyDesc: Every product comes with a full 2-year manufacturer warranty.
trust.supportDesc: Our tech experts are available around the clock via chat, email, or phone.

cta.title: Ready to Upgrade Your Tech?
cta.subtitle: Join over 50,000 customers who trust Datics for their electronics. New deals every week.

products.title: All Products
products.subtitle: Browse our full catalog of premium electronics and gadgets.

about.title: We Live and Breathe Tech
about.subtitle: Datics was founded in 2018 by a team of engineers and designers who believed buying great electronics should be simple, transparent, and enjoyable.
about.missionDesc: To make premium technology accessible to everyone by offering the best products at honest prices, backed by world-class support.
about.value1Desc: No hidden fees, no dark patterns. What you see is what you pay.
about.value2Desc: Every product is tested and verified before it reaches our catalog.
about.value3Desc: We measure success by how happy our customers are, not just revenue.

contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Have a question about an order, a product, or just want to say hi? Our team responds within 24 hours.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
